item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Sistem demokrasi di Indonesia menekankan keterlibatan masyarakat dalam proses pengambilan keputusan untuk menjaga keseimbangan antara kebebasan dan keadilan.

notes: Agent A begins with clear agreement that society should be prioritized, then softens into a balance frame where individual rights must be paired with social justice and participatory governance. Agent B keeps a stable individual-rights and constitutional-safeguards position while allowing that collective interests can coexist with individual liberties. Agent B turn 6 contains a script artifact: "The印尼 emphasis".
